case_title: WILLIAM STEWART et al VS. CORAZON TRISSEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEWART, WILLIAM BONIFACIO, ASHLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRISSEL, CORAZON $2,809.86 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,859.86 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
